ModMetaData.name: Roadbound World
ModMetaData.author: OpenAI for Johnny Berry
ModMetaData.description:
Roadbound World adds connected road maps with cross tile travel, roadside POIs, travelers crossing the road, hostile carryover between connected maps, a Morrowind inspired inventory replacement, larger personal pawn inventories, automatic nearby loot stashing into colonist inventories, and broader Morrowind style window skinning.
This package is a build ready source update. Rebuild the DLL through the included GitHub Actions workflow or your local RimWorld 1.6 mod build setup.
